results.title: Jeremy
highlights:
Sr. Specialist - AI & Data Engineer at Charles Schwab | Jeremy
...
# Sr. Specialist - AI & Data Engineer
...
Lone Tree, COOn-siteSeniorData EngineeringML / AI
...
Senior data engineer building AI-powered analytics and automation solutions for Corporate Treasury, combining Python, modern BI tools, and LLM capabilities to replace manual processes with scalable, production-grade systems.
...
## Tech Stack
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Git CI/CD SQL AI LLM Automation Analytics Data Modeling API Tableau Dashboards Data Engineering Power BI
...
The Treasury Analytics & Reporting team plays a critical role in advancing how Corporate Treasury operates—delivering scalable analytics, modern reporting, and automation that drives better decision-making across the balance sheet. As a Senior Specialist, you will act as a builder and problem-solver, translating complex business needs into practical, high-impact solutions. You’ll partner closely with Treasury stakeholders to understand challenges, shape ideas into tangible products, and bring them into production—enabling faster insights, greater efficiency, and improved operational performance.
...
In this role, you will design and develop data-driven applications and reporting solutions that replace manual processes with automated, scalable capabilities. Leveraging Python, modern BI tools, and emerging AI capabilities, you will create intuitive dashboards, interactive tools, and advanced analytics that empower leaders with clearer, more actionable insights. You will integrate data across systems, apply strong data modeling practices, and ensure solutions are reliable, performant, and adaptable over time.
...
Success in this role requires curiosity, ownership, and comfort operating in ambiguity—taking broad, undefined problems and structuring them into clear, executable solutions. You’ll present your work to senior leadership, articulate trade-offs, and influence decisions through evidence-backed insights. This is an opportunity to shape how innovation, automation, and AI enhance Treasury operations while continuously identifying new areas to drive impact.
...
### Required Qualifications
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, Finance, Economics, or related field
- 2+ years of experience building data, analytics, or software solutions in a business environment
- Advanced proficiency in Python for data analysis and application development
- Hands-on experience building and deploying applications using Streamlit or a comparable framework
- Experience applying AI/ML techniques, including large language models (LLMs), prompt design, or retrieval-based solutions
- Strong SQL skills and foundational expertise in data modeling
- Experience developing dashboards and reporting using modern BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker)
- Experience integrating systems through APIs
- Demonstrated success partnering with business stakeholders to deliver actionable solutions
- Strong communication skills with the ability to present insights and recommendations to senior leaders
- Proven ability to drive outcomes independently in ambiguous environments
...
### Preferred Qualifications
...
- 3+ years of experience building scalable analytics or software solutions
- Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Familiarity with version control, testing, and CI/CD practices
- Experience deploying machine learning or AI solutions into production environments
- Background in financial services, corporate finance, or treasury functions
- Demonstrated contributions to open-source projects or a technical portfolio
- Strong written documentation skills to enable scalability and knowledge sharing
...
### AI and ML Data Scientist

highlights:
This is an on-site, senior-level role based in Austin, Texas. Charles Schwab is looking for a Senior Product Manager to lead their Conversational AI and Digital Support initiatives. The role is focused on enhancing client interactions through AI-driven platforms and ensuring seamless digital experiences.

This role is ideal for someone skilled in AI product development, particularly with LLMs and hybrid systems. You'll leverage AI tools to improve conversational platforms, ensuring they are intuitive and reliable. The position demands a hands-on approach with vibe coding and rapid prototyping to accelerate delivery.
...
You will define and execute product strategies for Conversational AI and Digital Support, working closely with cross-functional teams. Your day involves managing the product lifecycle, from strategy to release, and ensuring high-quality AI experiences. You'll also communicate complex AI concepts to stakeholders and drive product improvements through data and experimentation.
...
- Experienced in digital product management with a focus on AI-driven platforms.
- Comfortable working on-site in Austin, Texas, and collaborating across teams.
- Skilled in vibe coding and rapid prototyping to enhance product delivery.
...
- Unfamiliar with AI technologies like LLMs or conversational platforms.
- Prefers remote work over on-site collaboration in Austin.
- Lacks experience in managing complex digital product lifecycles.
...
At Charles Schwab, we’re redefining how clients interact with digital experiences—using AI, search, and conversational platforms to simplify complex financial decisions. You will join a high-impact product team focused on Conversational AI, Enterprise Search, and Digital Support experiences across web and mobile. This includes chat, voice, search, and help content—all unified into a seamless client journey.
...
This role sits at the intersection of strategy, execution, and innovation. You will shape the future of AI-powered client experiences while ensuring operational excellence, scalability, and compliance. You will partner across product, engineering, data, design, risk, and service teams to deliver experiences that are intuitive, reliable, and high quality.

results.title: Job No Longer Available | Jeremy
highlights:
# Staff Data Scientist
...
Austin, TXSouthlake, TXHybridStaffML / AI
...
Lead the design and deployment of enterprise-scale AI and machine learning solutions at a major financial services firm, bridging advanced research with production-ready systems across multiple business units.
...
At Schwab, you will build a rewarding career while making a difference in the lives of our millions of clients. Here, innovative thinking meets creative problem solving as we work together to challenge the status quo. You’ll be part of a collaborative, technology-forward environment that values curiosity, continuous learning, and thoughtful problem-solving. Schwab Data is the centralized organization that manages and enables the use of data as a strategic asset across Schwab, supporting enterprise analytics, platforms, and data-driven decision-making. Joining Schwab means joining a company committed to
...
Schwab’s AI & Data Science organization is a centralized hub for delivering innovative production ready AI and machine learning solutions that drive measurable business outcomes across the firm. The team partners with Schwab business units to identify high impact use cases, pilot innovative analytical solutions, and transition successful models into enterprise level production systems. Our mission is to accelerate the adoption of AI as a strategic product capability—ensuring models are scalable, reusable, governable, and continuously delivering value.
...
As a Staff Data Scientist, you will play an essential part in advancing Schwab’s capabilities by driving the design, development, and implementation of innovative AI and machine learning solutions that address complex, enterprise scale challenges. You’ll bridge advanced research and robust engineering, owning the end‑to‑end lifecycle of high‑impact models. Successful candidates will work collaboratively across the organization with our business sponsors, development teams, and engineering partners. We are seeking a subject matter expert in all things AI, primed to identify and translate advanced analytical techniques, applications, and strategies into practical production ready solutions.
...
- Get hands-on with big data as you analyze, interpret, extract insights, and produce innovative AI solutions that enable advanced decisioning to leverage the latest algorithms, state-of-the-art techniques, and tools.
...
- Design and buildend-to-endmachine learning systems by defining scalable, reliable, and maintainable architectures that support data ingestion, feature generation, model training, evaluation, deployment, monitoring, and value measurement in production environments.
...
- Advance technical capabilities in emerging areas by leading complex initiatives involving advanced machine learning, recommender systems, real-time and low‑latency inference, or other evolving technologies that require deep technical expertise and comfort with ambiguity.
...
- 8+ years of experience in data science and machine learning.
...
- 6+ years of hands-on experience using Python and SQL to develop production‑grade, modular, and optimized code.
...
- Proven ability to convert business requirements into technical end-to-end machine learning solutions delivered against roadmap milestones for multiple lines of business.
...
- Proven experience developing supervised and unsupervised machine learning solutions, with delivery supported by documented evaluation metrics, performance tracking, and value measurement.
...
- Experience in applying natural language processing techniques to unstructured data with delivery to production.
...
- Practical experience designing LLM solutions (such as retrieval‑augmented generation, agent workflows, or fine‑tuning), deployed for internal use.
...
- Hands-on experience architecting machine learning solutions within cloud ecosystems (GCP, AWS, Azure)
...
- Experience building, maintaining, and optimizing data pipelines that support machine learning workflows.

...
Austin, TXOn-siteSeniorManagerData Engineering
...
Lead a data engineering team building cloud-based data platforms for a major financial services firm, with hands-on technical involvement in ETL, data warehouse design, and GCP infrastructure.
...
## Job description
...
In this role, you’ll lead a highly skilled data engineering team responsible for designing and delivering cloud-based data platforms that power critical business insights across the firm. You’ll partner closely with architects, product teams, and business leaders to shape scalable, secure, and reliable data solutions while creating an environment where engineers can do their best work, grow their careers, and see the impact of what they build. If you’re energized by leading people, solving complex data problems, and building platforms that matter, this is an opportunity to own your tomorrow at Schwab.
...
* Lead and develop a team of data engineers, providing clear direction, mentorship, and career development support 
* Partner with business stakeholders to understand strategic and financial objectives and translate them into scalable data solutions 
* Plan, estimate, prioritize, and coordinate technical activities across data engineering initiatives 
* Define and enforce standards, guidelines, and best practices for data design, development, testing, and deployment 
* Oversee ETL design, development, data management, and analytics delivery to ensure solutions meet functional and non-functional requirements 
* Identify and manage project dependencies and downstream impacts across applications and platforms 
* Evaluate new tools and technologies, lead proofs of concept, and recommend improvements to the enterprise data landscape 
* Collaborate with internal teams and external vendors to resolve platform issues and keep delivery on track 
* Ensure alignment with architecture policies, security standards, and development methodologies 
* Work effectively with onshore and offshore teams to deliver high-quality, timely solutions 
* Provide hands-on technical guidance and coding support when needed 
* Identify opportunities for system reuse, simplification, and continuous improvement ### What you have
...
**Required Qualifications**
...
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Technology, or a related field 
* 12+ years of experience designing, developing, and supporting ETL and database solutions 
* 7+ years of experience leading small to mid-sized technology projects 
* 3+ years of people leadership experience supporting highly technical teams 
* 3+ years of hands-on experience with Informatica Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC) 
* 3+ years of experience with Control-M 
* 3+ years of experience working with Google Cloud Platform technologies, including GCS, BigQuery, and Dataproc 
* Strong data modeling skills supporting operational and analytical reporting systems 
* Deep understanding of data warehouse concepts and cloud-based architecture patterns 
* Strong SQL skills and solid understanding of relational database concepts 
* Experience working in Agile delivery models using tools such as Jira 
* Excellent written, verbal, and interpersonal communication skills 
**Preferred Qualifications**
...
* Experience working in the financial services industry 
* Proficiency with Python, Perl, or other scripting languages 
* Familiarity with source control and DevOps tools and CI/CD best practices 
In addition to the salary range, this role is also eligible for bonus or incentive opportunities.

results.title: Miao He
highlights:
Agentic AI
...
Director of AI and Data Science at [Charles Schwab](https://www.linkedin.com/company/charles-schwab)
...
I have spent the past 12 years building and leading AI and data science teams that help financial institutions drive growth and improve investment efficiency. My work focuses on the intersection of AI, customer growth, and capital allocation, where the models we build directly influence how marketing dollars are spent. At Charles Schwab, I own the model portfolio for Marketing Mix, Brand Equity, and Net New Asset forecasting. I present quarterly readouts to head of Retail, CMO and other senior leadership to informs $1B+ in strategic capital allocation decisions across retail and marketing. My team’s work has contributed to more than $2B in incremental net new asset growth. I have also redesigned how the team operates by introducing an AI-native workflow that integrates agent AI into daily execution, which led to a 5x faster model delivery. I grew the team from 3 to 6, and we now cover a scope that would typically require a much larger organization. At Amex, I built and led a team of 9 data scientists and analysts to develop the company’s first real-time personalization engine for digital channels. The system dynamically matched offers to individual prospects and became a core part of the prospect marketing strategy I led. This work drove $250M in incremental revenue and improved conversion by 30 percent. I received the American Express President’s Award, given to the top 2 percent of employees. My focus over the past few years has shifted from building models to building organizations that use AI to create business value. I stay close to the technical side and continue to build when needed. I hold a Ph.D. in Industrial Engineering with a focus on machine learning.

results.title: Charles Schwab Research Scientist Interview Questions 2026
highlights:
At **Charles Schwab**, the **Research Scientist** role within the **AI.x** organization is a highly specialized, applied position designed to bridge the gap between cutting-edge artificial intelligence and practical financial services applications. Unlike purely academic research environments, the **AI.x** team focused on deploying high-impact, reliable machine learning solutions that directly affect millions of retail investors and institutional clients. The work here involves building system architectures that prioritize stability, security, compliance, and user trust.
...
As a **Research Scientist**, you will not be focused on training massive foundational models from scratch. Instead, your primary challenge will be the strategic application of existing architectures, fine-tuning techniques, and responsible AI frameworks to financial data. Whether you are working on natural language processing for customer support, predictive modeling for portfolio management, or building guardrails for generative AI, your contributions will directly influence how **Charles Schwab** manages risk and delivers financial advice.
...
This role requires a unique balance of rigorous engineering discipline and a deep understanding of standard machine learning methodologies. Because **Charles Schwab** operates in a heavily regulated industry, every model, framework, and pipeline you design must be explainable, robust, and aligned with the company's commitment to financial safety. Preparing for this role means demonstrating that you can deliver practical, structured, and highly reliable AI systems within these strict operational boundaries.
...
### Applied AI & Framework-Driven Scenarios
...
These questions evaluate how you structure machine
...
and solve domain-specific problems. Interviewers expect you to reference established, industry-standard frameworks and methodologies rather
...
inventing custom solutions on the fly.
...
* When deploying an LLM for customer-facing financial advice, what structured framework do you implement to detect and mitigate hallucinations?
...
As a **Research Scientist** in the **AI.x** group at **Charles Schwab**, your day-to-day work will be highly collaborative and focused on practical, high-value deployments. You will operate at the intersection of machine learning research, software engineering, and financial product development.
...
Your primary responsibility will be to design, develop, and deploy applied machine learning models that solve complex business problems. This includes optimizing natural language processing systems for customer interactions, building predictive models for financial forecasting, and implementing robust risk management tools. You will spend a significant portion of your time translating business requirements into structured machine learning pipelines that can run reliably at scale.
...
To be competitive for a **Research Scientist** position at **Charles Schwab**, you must possess a strong technical foundation combined with practical experience deploying machine learning systems in production.
...
* **Deep Learning Frameworks** – Proficiency in **PyTorch** or **TensorFlow** for building and fine-tuning neural network architectures.
...
**Academic Background**
...
* **Must-have skills** – Strong Python coding skills, deep understanding of classical ML and NLP, experience with model evaluation,
...
* **Nice-to-have skills** – Experience with large language model (LLM) alignment techniques (RLHF, DPO), knowledge of financial compliance regulations, and experience with distributed computing frameworks like Spark.
...
The **Research Scientist** position within the **AI.x** group at **Charles Schwab** offers an exceptional opportunity to build and deploy high-impact, responsible AI systems at massive scale. By focusing on applied machine learning, robust system design, and industry-standard frameworks, you can play a pivotal role in shaping the future of financial services.

software development • development • research & development • research • emerging tech • engineer • calm • data • inform • assist • software development & engineering • software engineering • technology • proof of concepts (pocs) • deep dive analysis • ideas • fraud • engineering software • development engineering • research assistant • business technology • data science • support • engineering
...
### Alpaca: Building Dynamic Cyber Ranges with Procedurally-Generated Vulnerability Lattices
...
Developing cyber ranges for cybersecurity penetration testing and capture-the-flag challenges is normally a time-consuming process. A good cyber range challenges practitioners to find obscure paths to break into a system. The cyber range should encourage a "graph thinking" mindset, in which the attacker approaches the challenge from a variety of directions that may involve multiple steps before escalating privileges and solving the challenge. However, developing cyber ranges usually requires significant time and effort, and the solutions of many pre-made cyber ranges have already been published. We have developed Alpaca, a system that generates complex cyber ranges according to user-specified constraints. Using an AI planning engine and a database of vulnerabilities and machine configurations, the system is able to generate "vulnerability lattices," that is, sequences of vulnerabilities and exploits that achieve a user-specified goal. Alpaca also generates working virtual machines that include the vulnerabilities in the lattice. Constraints may be specified to require Alpaca to generate cyber ranges with a minimum or maximum complexity or require that certain vulnerabilities must be used to exploit the cyber range. Show less

results.title: John Min
highlights:
I'm a results-driven professional with over 5 years of experience spanning AI Product Development, Wealth Management, Data Analytics, and Business Operations — currently working at Charles Schwab where I've built a career at the intersection of finance and emerging technology. My journey has taken me from educating clients on wealth management solutions as a Financial Consultant, to leading AI agent development as an Agentic AI Product Owner — becoming the first Certified AI Agent Developer in Schwab's AI Studio initiative. I thrive on solving complex business challenges through creative, data-driven solutions and building things that didn't exist before. Some highlights from my career: - Developed custom AI agent solutions that reduced processing times from hours to seconds - Generated millions in client assets through consultative wealth management - Built department-first initiatives including onboarding programs, automation workflows, and Salesforce dashboards adopted across the organization - Led my team to a 1st place finish at the Texas A&M Data Analytics Business Project Management Competition - Received the 2023 Charles Schwab CS&S Open Award for exceptional client service Whether I'm validating LLM models, designing AI workflows, or partnering with cross-functional teams to drive business growth, I bring the same mindset — find the gap, build the solution, and deliver results. Let's connect!
...
Serving as an Agentic AI Product Owner, leading the end-to-end development and deployment of custom AI agent solutions to optimize workflows and resolve critical business challenges. Became the first Certified AI Agent Developer in our AI Studio initiative at Charles Schwab. Partnered with cross-functional teams to identify AI-driven process improvement opportunities, translating complex business requirements into actionable AI agent designs. Delivered compelling presentations and live demonstrations of the Writer Platform to drive stakeholder engagement and adoption. Championed proof-of-concept initiatives to integrate AI solutions into cross-functional business workflows and operated in an Agile environment, participating in Sprint Planning, Refinement, and Daily Standups.
...
Served as an AI Model Validator focused on ensuring the accuracy, reliability, and continuous improvement of large language models (LLMs) within the organization. Analyzed 1,000+ LLM responses to identify performance gaps and actionable insights, directly contributing to measurable improvements in AI model quality. Led performance monitoring initiatives to ensure models maintained compliance and operational efficiency over time. Designed and implemented data categorization methodologies to systematically evaluate model outputs, organizing findings into comprehensive reports that informed strategic decisions for stakeholders. Developed and presented proof-of-concept initiatives to demonstrate how AI solutions could be integrated into cross-functional business workflows, helping drive organizational buy-in and accelerate AI adoption.
